arts.ttl: Sandro Tonali lifts lid on AC Milan axe and Newcastle United sacrifice - 'I don't care' - Chronicle Live
arts.sum: Tonali has looked alive and alert on match days under Howe though this season and the dream midfield trio of Joelinton, the Italian star and Bruno Guimaraes has finally taken the Premier League by storm. Newcastle United star Tonali said to the Italian publication: "Once Pioli left me out because I had skipped both breakfast and the meeting.

arts.ttl: Newcastle vs Brentford Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: In the first game since their Carabao Cup triumph, Newcastle host Brentford at St James’ Park on Wednesday evening. Ahead of the match, we’ve made our score prediction, provided our predi...

arts.ttl: Tino Livramento's Mo Salah secret after Newcastle United tactics left Liverpool with no answers
arts.sum: But Livramento let Chronicle Live into a little secret - he hasn't even watched back his defensive masterclass against Salah and has had no interest in poring over Wembley highlights. Livramento has also spoken of the moment Howe gave the players a crucial little bit of extra confidence after the 1-0 victory at West Ham during the build-up to the Carabao Cup final.

arts.ttl: Jamie O'Hara 'cringes' but his Newcastle United nightmare is just beginning
arts.sum: Not after hearing O'Hara's bizarre reaction to 300,000 Geordies coming out in force to celebrate Newcastle United ending a crippling wait to win a major domestic trophy. You would not have known that Jamie O'Hara once described winning the Carabao Cup as a 'proud moment' or that the former Spurs midfielder 'cried his eyes out' after being left out of the match day squad for the 2008 final.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United's dream defence for next season - £50m signing, Trippier call, Schar contract - Matty Hewitt - Chronicle Live
arts.sum: The Magpies have already secured a return to European football and will take part in the Europa Conference League next season after winning the Carabao Cup. You'd back Eddie Howe's side to be one of the favourites for that competition, especially given how well English sides have fared in previous editions of the tournament. It's no secret that Newcastle want to sign a right-sided centre-half to provide competition and cover for Fabian Schar, who we'll get onto a little later.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United's exact points tally predicted in race for Champions League football
arts.sum: Newcastle's destiny is well and truly in their own hands, two points adrift of Chelsea who occupy fourth place in the Premier League, in what is usually the final Champions League spot. However, the Toon are also just a point behind Manchester City in fifth, with that also likely to be enough to secure a return to the Champions League this season, due to the current UEFA coefficients.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United flop rubbishes 'revenge' theory after proving doubters wrong
arts.sum: Sels still harbours regrets over his previous spell in England but this week admitted he holds no feelings of malice towards Newcastle, despite lasting just one season at St James' Park under Rafa Benitez . Speaking to Belgian outlet De Morgen in November, he said: "Why it is working out now [with Nottingham Forest] and not at Newcastle United eight years ago?

arts.ttl: Newcastle vs Brentford: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Previewing Newcastle vs Brentford in the Premier League on Wednesday, including team news, predictions and how to watch on TV.

arts.ttl: Report: Newcastle submit surprise £50m bid to sign Liverpool attacker; ‘offer could be hard to refuse’
arts.sum: Liverpool are expected to have a very busy summer transfer window with several players expected to leave. The futures of Mohamed Salah and Virgil van Dijk remain uncertain, as both stars approach the final year of their contracts without any concrete updates on extensions. Meanwhile, Trent Alexander-Arnold is reportedly set to join Real Madrid on […] The post Report: Newcastle submit surprise £50m bid to sign Liverpool attacker; ‘offer could be hard to refuse’ appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot warns Liverpool: Newcastle outworked us and that is unacceptable
arts.sum: Manager wants reaction at home in Wednesday’s derby Slot says PSG defeat cut deeper than cup final loss Arne Slot told Liverpool players their work rate in the Carabao Cup final was not acceptable during talks aimed at reinforcing the standards that have underpinned their Premier League title pursuit. Liverpool resume their title challenge with a Merseyside derby against Everton on Wednesday when Slot and his squad will be seeking to put a bruising spell behind them and edge closer to a 20th league championship.
